description: Italian mafia clan based in Marano di Napoli, founded in the 1960s by the Nuvoletta brothers Angelo, Lorenzo, and Ciro. It was one of the most powerful clans between the 1970s and 1990s, involved in cigarette smuggling and heroin trafficking, with strong ties to Sicilian Cosa Nostra. After the deaths of its historical leaders in the 1990s-2000s, it was replaced by the Polverino and Orlando clans.
